component: AAP Pediatric Care Online tables and algorithms
finding: The subscription terms do not grant the intended product-incorporation right and require separate written approval for adaptation or incorporation of the Materials.
safe_residual_use: Internal clinical research within the subscription scope
product_impact: Block direct ingestion of AAP tables and algorithms into the commercial runtime.
permission_strategy: Request an AAP EHR/CDS commercial license or replace with independently sourced and authored evidence logic.
next_action: Inventory AAP-dependent components and identify primary-source alternatives.
retry_trigger: Written commercial permission or approved alternative-source implementation

review.notes: Operational triage; counsel review required for final commercial determination
